attempt_detection.meaningful_line_definition: A non-blank, non-comment line that is not part of the untouched starter template (teacher-configurable).

rubric_scale.1: meaningful attempt but not submitted or minimal

tests.notes: Populate with input/output cases OR structural checks. For pygame animations, consider static checks (required variables/loops/wait) + limited run smoke-test.

static_checks.notes: Use AST/token checks to confirm key concepts (e.g., loop, offset, pygame.display.flip, pygame.time.wait).

coherence_guardrails.name: draw_inside_loop
coherence_guardrails.rule: If a required pygame.draw.* call appears only outside the main while-loop, score cannot exceed 2.

coherence_guardrails.name: flip_inside_loop
coherence_guardrails.rule: If flip/update exists but only outside the main while-loop, score cannot exceed 2.

coherence_guardrails.name: updated_pos_used_in_draw
coherence_guardrails.rule: If position variables (x/y/offset) are updated but never appear as arguments in a pygame.draw call, score cannot exceed 2 and may not count as meaningful attempt.

score3_minimums: Display flip/update and timing control each frame
Draw line from string_start to the moving yoyo point
Draw circle at the same moving yoyo point

fill_zones.name: offset_setup_and_update
fill_zones.notes: Expect a motion offset initialized before the loop and updated each frame.

fill_zones.name: point_from_offset
fill_zones.notes: Expect a center point tuple computed from yoyo_y plus the motion offset.

fill_zones.name: draw_line_to_point
fill_zones.notes: Expect a line from string_start to the moving point.

fill_zones.name: draw_circle_at_point
fill_zones.notes: Expect a yoyo circle drawn at the moving point.

fill_zones.name: flip_and_wait
fill_zones.notes: Expect display update and frame delay.

coherence_guardrails.name: updated_pos_used_in_draw
coherence_guardrails.rule: If offset is updated but never used to build polygon points that are passed to pygame.draw.polygon, score cannot exceed 2.

score3_minimums: Four point tuples created using left/right/top/bottom and offset
Display flip/update and timing control each frame

fill_zones.name: offset_setup_and_update
fill_zones.notes: Expect offset variable setup followed by per-frame update.

fill_zones.name: polygon_points
fill_zones.notes: Expect four clockwise-rotation points derived from left/right/top/bottom and offset.

fill_zones.name: draw_polygon
fill_zones.notes: Expect pygame.draw.polygon using the constructed points.

fill_zones.name: flip_and_wait
fill_zones.notes: Expect display update and frame delay.

fill_zones.name: apply_offset_to_rect
prompt_hints: Use the offset to set the elevator rect
fill_zones.notes: Expect elevator rect y-position to be set/updated using offset.

fill_zones.name: draw_elevator_rect
prompt_hints: Draw the elevator as a rectangle
fill_zones.notes: Expect pygame.draw.rect usage to draw the elevator.

fill_zones.name: flip_and_wait
fill_zones.notes: Expect per-frame display update and timing control.

coherence_guardrails.name: offset_used_with_rect
coherence_guardrails.rule: If 'offset' is updated but never used on a line referencing 'elevator_rect', score cannot exceed 2 and may not count as meaningful attempt.

coherence_guardrails.name: draw_inside_loop
coherence_guardrails.rule: If pygame.draw.rect appears only outside the main while-loop, score cannot exceed 2.

coherence_guardrails.rule: If flip/update exists but only outside the main while-loop, score cannot exceed 2.

zone_match_rules: Must contain at least one non-comment, non-blank Python statement within the zone
Must match at least one expected pattern for that zone (regex/token/AST-based)
coherence_guardrails: If a required variable is defined but never used in required context, do not count as meaningful
If draw/update calls exist but are outside the main loop when loop is required, score cannot exceed 2

smoke_run.notes: For pygame, prefer static checks; smoke-run is optional and should run in a sandbox with display disabled when possible.
